# Caching.MethodsForNotification method

Returns the method names whose cached results should be invalidated when *notification* is received. Mirrors TS `methodsForNotification`. (R-13.5-j)

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> MethodsForNotification(string notification)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| notification | The notification method name. |

## Return Value

The methods to invalidate (possibly empty).
